assertions.title: API-backed agent supports multi-turn conversation with tool use

steps.action: Verify single turn completes with final answer
steps.expected: Agent returns SUCCESS with correct task_id

steps.action: Verify tool calls dispatched and results fed back
steps.expected: Tool handler called with correct arguments, result continues conversation

steps.action: Verify multiple tool calls in single response
Verify tool call failure continues conversation
steps.expected: Error captured and passed back to LLM, conversation continues
steps.observed: PASSED: 'Tool execution failed!' in tool_results[0]['content'], result.status == SUCCESS

evidence.keyAssertions: tool_handler called with correct tool_name, multiple tools dispatched in order, tool errors passed back to LLM

steps.action: Verify same agent type works with different providers
steps.expected: Agent routes to different providers without code changes
steps.observed: PASSED: provider A returns 'From provider A', provider B returns 'From provider B', both via APIAgent
PASSED: RuntimeError from provider -> result.status == ERROR, error_category == API_ERROR

evidence.keyAssertions: APIAgent accepts any BaseProvider, provider errors mapped to ERROR/API_ERROR

steps.action: Verify max turns exceeded returns ERROR/MAX_TURNS_EXCEEDED
steps.observed: PASSED with max_turns=3, provider always returns tool calls -> status=ERROR, error_category=MAX_TURNS_EXCEEDED
PASSED: result.transcript is not None, len(result.transcript) > 0

steps.expected: Agent succeeds when finishing exactly at limit
steps.observed: PASSED: 3 responses (2 tool calls + 1 final) with max_turns=3 -> SUCCESS

evidence.keyAssertions: status=ERROR + error_category=MAX_TURNS_EXCEEDED when exceeded; partial transcript preserved; exact max_turns succeeds

assertions.title: Agent enforces timeout on total execution time

steps.expected: result.status == TIMEOUT when wall-clock exceeds config
steps.observed: PASSED: provider with delay=0.2s, timeout=0.5s, 100 responses -> result.status == TIMEOUT
PASSED: result.status == TIMEOUT, transcript is not None, len(transcript) > 0

evidence.keyAssertions: status=TIMEOUT when wall-clock exceeds limit; partial transcript preserved on timeout

assertions.title: Agent implementations are pluggable via registry

steps.observed: 7 tests passed: test_register_and_retrieve_agent, test_duplicate_registration_fails, test_duplicate_registration_with_overwrite, test_list_registered_agents, test_retrieving_unregistered_agent_raises, test_builtin_api_agent_registered, test_custom_agent_selected_by_config

steps.expected: Custom agent registered by name, retrieved and runnable
steps.observed: PASSED: registry.register('custom_agent', factory), registry.create returns BaseAgent, result.status == SUCCESS

steps.action: Verify custom agent selectable by name
steps.expected: Custom agent created from registry and runs correctly

evidence.keyAssertions: Register/retrieve by name, duplicate ValueError, overwrite=True works, builtin 'api' pre-registered, custom agents selectable by name

steps.action: Verify all messages in transcript in order

steps.expected: Original content of each message preserved
steps.observed: PASSED: transcript[0]['content'] == 'What is 2+2?', transcript[1]['content'] == 'Thinking about it...'

steps.expected: System prompt appears as first message
steps.observed: PASSED: transcript[0]['role'] == 'system', transcript[0]['content'] == 'You are a helpful assistant.'

evidence.keyAssertions: All messages preserved in order with correct roles, content preserved, system prompt included as first message

assertions.title: Agent token counting is accurate per turn

steps.expected: Each assistant message has token_usage with prompt/completion
steps.observed: PASSED: each assistant message has 'token_usage' with 'prompt_tokens' and 'completion_tokens'

steps.action: Verify token counts sum to total
steps.observed: PASSED: telemetry.tokens.prompt == total_prompt, telemetry.tokens.completion == total_completion, telemetry.tokens.total == sum

steps.action: Verify zero tokens when not reported
steps.expected: Telemetry defaults to 0 when provider reports 0

evidence.keyAssertions: Per-turn token_usage on all assistant messages, sums match telemetry totals, zero-token case handled

commandsRun.output: 42 passed in 2.02s — all tests across 12 test classes passed: TestConversationModel (9), TestMockProvider (3), TestAPIAgentMultiTurn (4), TestAPIAgentMaxTurns (3), TestAPIAgentTimeout (2), TestAPIAgentTranscript (3), TestAPIAgentTokenCounting (3), TestAPIAgentProviderAgnostic (2), TestAgentRegistry (7), TestAPIAgentIsBaseAgent (2), TestAPIAgentTelemetry (4)

summary: All 7 assertions (VAL-AGENT-01 through VAL-AGENT-07) passed. 42 pytest tests passed covering multi-turn conversation, provider-agnostic routing, max-turns limit, timeout enforcement, pluggable registry, full conversation transcript, and per-turn token counting. Type checking with ty also passed with zero errors.
